title: Untraced module in bin/ discovered as C->R
description: Add a module in bin/ with no @req traceability — solver discovers C->R candidate

mutation.description: Create feature handler module with no requirement tracing

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should discover C->R candidate for untraced module

title: Test file without formal-test-sync mapping
description: Create a test file with no formal-test-sync mapping — T->R discovery

mutation.description: Create test file with no @req or formal sync mapping

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should discover T->R candidate for untraced test

title: Untraced config validator module discovered as C->R
description: Add a config validation module in bin/ with no @req traceability — solver discovers C->R candidate

mutation.description: Create config validator module with no requirement tracing

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should discover C->R candidate for untraced config validator

title: Untraced state machine module discovered as C->R
description: Add a state machine module in bin/ with transition logic but no @req traceability — solver discovers C->R candidate

mutation.description: Create state machine module with no requirement tracing

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should discover C->R candidate for untraced state machine module

title: Module that should NOT get a requirement
description: Add a utility/helper module that solver should shelve as not-needing-a-requirement

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should discover then shelve as acknowledged-not-required

title: Overlapping C->R and T->R for same feature
description: Create overlapping C->R and T->R candidates for the same feature — deduplication test

mutation.description: Create module + test pair both missing requirements

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should deduplicate overlapping reverse flow candidates

title: Reverse flow creating circular requirement dependency
description: Introduce a reverse flow candidate that would create a circular requirement dependency

mutation.description: Add candidate that creates circular dependency

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect circular dependency and reject candidate
